overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a derelict urban area under a massive highway overpass. The player moves from a paved street past abandoned buildings, through a dirt field, and into a homeless encampment with a campfire, before emerging to view a futuristic city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: derelict urban street with abandoned buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along paved sidewalk past derelict buildings toward an overpass

entered.detail: abandoned multi-story buildings with broken windows and antennas
concrete sidewalk with red painted edges
wooden utility pole with transformer and wires
massive concrete highway overpass with support columns
scattered garbage bags and debris along the fence

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a derelict urban street with abandoned buildings lining a paved walkway. The camera moves forward toward a massive concrete highway overpass in the distance, with utility poles and scattered trash visible along the right side. The atmosphere is quiet and desolate under an overcast sky.

events.description: transition from paved sidewalk to dirt and grass terrain
entering the shadow cast by the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking off the pavement onto dirt ground approaching the overpass

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers lining the path
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions from pavement to dirt and sparse grass as the camera approaches the overpass. Concrete barriers appear on the right while a graffiti-covered wall becomes visible on the left. The lighting gradually dims as the camera enters the shadow of the massive concrete structure overhead.

events.description: campfire becomes visible in the distance under the bridge

agents.ego_description: walking deeper under the overpass toward a makeshift encampment

notable_agents.action: person sitting near campfire in the distance

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars for the overpass
scattered trash, cardboard, and abandoned items

segments.scene_description: Now deep under the overpass, the scene is dimly lit with massive concrete pillars dominating the space. The ground is littered with encampment debris and blue barrels. In the distance, a campfire glows orange, marking the presence of inhabitants in this sheltered urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: active homeless encampment with central campfire

events.description: slowing approach to observe the encampment and campfire
passing close by the burning campfire

agents.ego_description: walking through the encampment passing people sitting around the fire and makeshift furniture

notable_agents.action: person sitting in red plastic chair near the fire
person sitting on couch watching the fire

entered.detail: large burning fire pit with flames and smoke
red plastic chair near the fire
green tarp shelter with white sheet covering

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the heart of the encampment where a large campfire burns brightly, illuminating the faces of people sitting on makeshift furniture including a red plastic chair and a worn couch. The area is cluttered with survival items and shelters, with graffiti covering the nearby walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open field with view of futuristic city skyline

events.description: exiting the underpass into bright open area with city skyline view

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the bridge into an open field toward a small building with towering futuristic skyscrapers in the background

notable_agents.action: people sitting at table under shelter near small blue building

entered.detail: small blue wooden building with white trim
massive futuristic tower with 07 marking and industrial structures
dry grass field with scattered debris
distant futuristic city towers and industrial smokestacks

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the darkness of the underpass into bright daylight, the scene opens to a wide field with a small blue building ahead. In the background, massive futuristic skyscrapers including one marked 07 tower over the landscape, contrasting the poverty of the encampment with the wealth of the corporate city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate urban street into the shadows of a massive overpass, eventually emerging to reveal a towering futuristic skyline. It begins on a paved walkway lined with abandoned buildings and scattered trash, moving steadily toward a concrete highway structure under an overcast sky. As the pavement transitions into dirt and sparse grass, the camera passes graffiti-covered walls and concrete barriers, with the lighting gradually dimming upon entering the deep shadow of the overpass. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit encampment dominated by massive pillars and blue barrels, moving through the glow of a bright campfire where people gather on makeshift furniture. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into bright daylight, opening onto a wide field that contrasts a small blue building with the massive, corporate skyscrapers of the city in the distance.
